description: Alcohol Intake and Colorectal Cancer Data
skip_reason: Pre-aggregated epidemiological rate data: rows represent study-level dose groups with continuous `dose` values and summary statistics (`cases`, `peryears`, `logrr`, `se`). No individual-level binary outcome column; the outcome is a continuous log relative risk. Cannot be aggregated to Successes/Cases per (Treatment × Stratum) cell from this data.
